seedLabel: Local operator-reviewed draft scaffold — internal planning only, not approved client copy
internalDraftLabel: INTERNAL DRAFT SCAFFOLD — NOT APPROVED CLIENT COPY
verificationRequiredNotes: Hospital, accreditation, partner, and license statements in draft scaffolds require verification before client-facing use.
Draft scaffolds are outline-only and must pass medical compliance review before publication.
Do not treat draft scaffold headings as approved credential or outcome claims.

service_page.heading: Audience and consultation context
service_page.purpose: Frame who the page serves and why prescriber-led consultation comes first.

service_page.heading: Eligibility and screening overview
service_page.purpose: Outline educational screening themes without universal suitability claims.

service_page.heading: Licensed provider oversight
service_page.purpose: Explain licensed practitioner involvement and follow-up planning.

service_page.heading: Next steps and booking support
service_page.purpose: Plan consult/booking CTA language without outcome promises.

faq.heading: Common patient questions
faq.purpose: List FAQ themes mapped to search intent without medical outcome claims.

faq.heading: Eligibility and safety framing
faq.purpose: Plan educational answers on suitability and licensed assessment.

faq.heading: Process and expectation setting
faq.purpose: Outline visit, monitoring, or journey steps with realistic-expectation language.

faq.heading: Trust and verification support
faq.purpose: Plan verification guidance where facility or credential claims may appear.

blog_article.heading: Topic context and audience hook
blog_article.purpose: Introduce the educational topic for the mapped audience segment.

blog_article.heading: Educational body sections
blog_article.purpose: Plan section themes from SEO clusters without efficacy promises.

blog_article.heading: Realistic expectations and limitations
blog_article.purpose: Include consultative framing and individualized assessment notes.

blog_article.heading: Consultation CTA planning
blog_article.purpose: Plan internal CTA outline for booking or screening contact.

comparison_education.heading: Educational comparison framing
comparison_education.purpose: Compare consultation themes without ranking clinics or promising outcomes.

comparison_education.heading: Consultation and candidacy requirements
comparison_education.purpose: Outline prescriber-led assessment and licensed provider context.

comparison_education.heading: Verification and trust support
comparison_education.purpose: Plan credential verification steps where hospital or license topics appear.

comparison_education.heading: Safety and compliance notes
comparison_education.purpose: Capture compliance reminders for reviewers before draft expansion.

booking_contact_support.heading: Booking and contact context
booking_contact_support.purpose: Plan support content for consultation booking without medical claims.

booking_contact_support.heading: Patient journey support
booking_contact_support.purpose: Outline travel, follow-up, or coordination themes for medical tourists.
